source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Static_Daily_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Load_Daily_Vuln_from_Stage81_') AS Static_Daily_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Static_Daily_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Load_Daily_Vuln_from_Stage81_') AS Static_Daily_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Pit_Table_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Load_Daily_Vuln_from_Stage81_') AS Pit_Table_SchemaName,

(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Stage_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Load_Daily_Vuln_from_Stage85_') AS Stage_TableName,

(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Static_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Load_Daily_Vuln_from_Stage85_') AS Static_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Vuln_View_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Load_Daily_Vuln_from_View86_') AS Vuln_View_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Vuln_View_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Load_Daily_Vuln_from_View86_') AS Vuln_View_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Load_Daily_Vuln_from_View86_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,

(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Vuln_View_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Ad-_Hoc_Dev_Load89_') AS Vuln_View_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Vuln_View_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Ad-_Hoc_Dev_Load89_') AS Vuln_View_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Ad-_Hoc_Dev_Load89_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Ad-_Hoc_Dev_Load89_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Vuln_View_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Ad-_Hoc_Dev_Load89_') AS Vuln_View_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Vuln_View_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'DailyRefresh_ActiveVulnTbl_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Ad-_Hoc_Dev_Load89_') AS Vuln_View_TableName,

scripts.text:
DELETE FROM  [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_VulnActive_Daily_PIT_MetricsSource]
WHERE PIT_Date = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

INSERT INTO 
   [dbo].[tbl_Vuln_Metrics_Monthly_Reduced_Detail]

SELECT  [CIO_Direct_Supplimented]
      ,[Senior_Lead_Supplimented]
      ,[TechnicalManager_App1]
      ,[StatusFlag]
      ,cast([FirstDetected] as date) as [FirstDetected]
      ,cast([ValidatedDate] as date) as ValidatedDate
      ,[TCOODueDate]
      ,[CombID]
      ,getdate()

  FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[vw_Metrics_Detailed]

select 
case 
when DATEPART(hour,getdate() ) between 12 and 16 then 1
when DATEPART(hour,getdate() )between 17 and 20 then 2
else 0 end as ExecuteSeriesFlag
